hero.subheadline: For nearly four decades, families across Cincinnati have trusted Aquamarine Pools & Spas for flawless fiberglass pool installations. From backyard dreams to resort-worthy retreats, we handle everything so you can simply enjoy the water.

cards.description: Seasonal prep done right. We open your pool for summer fun and close it properly to prevent costly winter damage.

cards.title: Repairs & Renovations

cards.title: Landscape & Hardscape Design

cards.title: Commercial & HOA Services
cards.description: Comprehensive maintenance programs designed for community pools, HOAs, and commercial aquatic facilities.

about.label: About Aquamarine Pools
about.headline: A Family Legacy Built on Trust & Craftsmanship
about.description: Since 1988, Aquamarine Pools & Spas has been Cincinnati's original and exclusive fiberglass pool installer. Our roots in the pool industry go back even further - to 1956 in Florida. That heritage means every pool we build benefits from decades of hands-on expertise passed down through our family. We take pride in delivering complete, turnkey installations where quality is never compromised.

features.title: Cincinnati's Oldest Fiberglass Installer
features.description: Since 1988, we have been the area's original and exclusive fiberglass pool dealer with roots in the industry dating back to 1956.

features.title: Complete Turnkey Projects
features.description: We handle everything - excavation, plumbing, electrical, landscaping, and hardscape - so you never juggle multiple contractors.

features.title: Residential & Commercial Experts
features.description: From backyard family pools to community HOA facilities, we bring the same dedication and craftsmanship to every project.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every quote includes the full scope of work - excavation, plumbing, electrical, and finishing. No hidden fees, no surprise change orders.

guarantee.headline: Our Family Promise to You
guarantee.description: When you choose Aquamarine Pools, you are choosing a family that stakes its 38-year reputation on every project. If something is not right, we make it right - period. Our commitment to quality craftsmanship and honest service is why Cincinnati families have trusted us for nearly four decades.

faqs.question: How long does a fiberglass pool installation take?
faqs.answer: Most fiberglass pool installations are completed in 2-4 weeks from excavation to swim day, depending on the complexity of the project and any additional hardscape or landscape work included.

faqs.question: Do you handle all the permits and inspections?
faqs.answer: Yes. As a turnkey installer, we manage the entire process including permits, inspections, excavation, plumbing, electrical, and finishing so you never have to coordinate multiple contractors.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve around Cincinnati?
faqs.answer: We serve Cincinnati, Milford, and surrounding Ohio communities. If you are within the greater Cincinnati area, we would be happy to schedule a free consultation at your property.

faqs.question: Why choose fiberglass over concrete or vinyl?
faqs.answer: Fiberglass pools install faster, require less maintenance, resist algae growth, and typically last longer than concrete or vinyl alternatives. They also come with smooth, non-abrasive surfaces that are gentle on skin.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you did not install?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our maintenance, repair, and renovation services are available for all pool types - fiberglass, concrete, and vinyl liner - regardless of who originally installed them.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer

testimonials.text: Marc and his team are the best. He takes pride in staying up to date with continued education and gave a direct, no nonsense estimate while taking time to explain his recommendations.

testimonials.name: Pool Owner
testimonials.text: Professional, quality work, and very responsive. They handled our pool light repair, filter cleaning, and water treatment with expertise.
